question: I'm going back to our previous chat about the Lost Temple of the Djinn one-shot. Can you remind me how many mummies the party will face in the temple?

retrieval_results.context: User wants a D&D one-shot adventure for level 8 PCs, including stat blocks for enemies, loot for success, a surprise twist in the final battle, cool layered actions, detailed traps, and a comprehensive description to help a GM run the one-shot smoothly.
